sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate
First-party intake, renderers, and Projection posture
complete selected dependency and transition record

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 4 of the exact thirteen-entry HCM-2.1 planning subject after three bounded findings/remediation rounds. Review 3 produced two Required findings; parent docs-only remediation now freezes C04 reduced-v1-m8.2 across flow/compiler while preserving C03 reduced-v1-m8 generation 1, and carries owned descriptor paths through every named budget, flow resolver subject/next-action, compiler subject/next-action, blocker, refusal, JSON/inspect/CLI surface without leaks or fixed adapters. Independently revalidate all prior findings and full live implementability; inherit no clean conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted thirteen-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, HCM-2.1 SPEC, plan, unchecked todo, all four planning proof files, and immutable Review 1 through Review 3 dispatches.
Read Review 1 cited live engine/compiler/flow/CLI/template/fixture/test sources and unchanged 01, 02, 03, 05, 07, 08, HCM-0.6 decision, selected HCM-1.4 record, and definition assets only as needed.
Run bounded read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, source/API feasibility, DTO/byte-contract, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, security, and proof checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, definition, template, fixture, test, runtime/product, pipeline, HCM-2.2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, contract, dock, or publication implementation.

Do not invent an alternative remediation, schema field, compatibility mode, serializer, renderer rule, observation model, DTO, budget domain, platform guarantee, Environment Inventory conversion, or pipeline migration.
Do not treat any prior review, remediation proof, baseline test, or contingent status wording as evidence that the thirteen-entry subject is clean.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact thirteen-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with exact evidence, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.
Revalidate all eleven prior Required findings and three remediation rounds against live source and cross-document truth.

Verify C04 reduced-v1-m8.2 is exact and complete across flow construction, compiler constant/acceptance/rejection, JSON/shared/inspect/CLI, tests, allowed files, and fixed siblings while C03 remains unchanged.

Verify selected descriptor paths remain owned through every enumerated packet, budget, resolver subject/next-action, compiler subject/next-action, blocker/refusal, JSON/inspect/CLI carrier with exact move/clone rules and no leak, intern, hard-coded adapter, ambient selector, or lifetime coercion.

Verify Environment Inventory reference-only cutover, retained observation/ABA/reasons, closed YAML and Markdown bytes, doctor/setup/author/flow semantics, budget/freshness/log domains, and non-Unix proof are total and implementable.

Verify outcome-neutral current status, docs-only scope, unchecked todo, bridge/classification ceiling, review lineage, staged GitNexus gate, primary commit, and separate parent handoff/ledger closeout.
Return CLEAN only if no valid Critical or Required finding remains; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits and keep checks bounded.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than selecting unspecified bytes, DTO behavior, observation semantics, Environment Inventory conversion, unsafe platform fallback, compatibility, pipeline, or later-slice behavior.
Return to the parent if valid remediation would require implementation now, a schema/kind/profile/descriptor change, broader product authority, HCM-2.2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
